headline: President Trump lashed out at Pope Leo XIV following the pontiff’s public condemnation of the war in Iran

Powerful Democrats are calling for Rep. Eric Swalwell to end his campaign for California governor, citing allegations of sexual misconduct. Swalwell called the allegations “flat false.”

Actual factory output is up sharply and may be picking up speed, even though factory jobs have slid steadily. Credit the most basic economic force of all: demand, writes @greg_ip
